title: Endless Recipes
description: Get items from the end without going to the End.
body:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Endless Recipes Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c85aaabbf5d6006bee4577557e3a0c3f4146b6d4.png)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Description
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 
Endless Recipies is a simple recipe mod that allows player to get many items only attainable in the end without going through the harshness that is the end. This mod is also made so that limited resources from the End can be gotten without having to go millions of blocks just to get an elytra for example. (Mainly on Large Servers)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
This mod also includes a crafting recipe for the End Portal Frames.
  
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  
 ![Recipe for End Portal Frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc4a2a86eb37b1ad2f29ab6532dc19958e404a3a.png)

</details>

Usage

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Yes, You can use this nod in a modpack (Just please put some kind of credit please)
- Yes, You can put this mod in a video (Just please put some kind of credit please)
- No, You can not Re-distribute this mod on other platforms.
